elements.label: Description
elements.value: Mid-early fruit with purple hue. Merges into Orange.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/grape.schema.json, set ct_grape_radius to {{ct_grape_radius}}]
Set Grape radius to {{ct_grape_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/grape.schema.json, set ct_grape_score to {{ct_grape_score}}]
Set Grape merge score to {{ct_grape_score}} points.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/grape.schema.json, set ct_grape_weight to {{ct_grape_weight}}]
Set Grape spawn weight to {{ct_grape_weight}}.
